//: Minimal Node project skeleton for the scaffold. Copy to repo root as package.json and fill in. The pack standardises on pnpm via Corepack — `packageManager` below pins it so every clone/worktree/CI uses the same pnpm. Do NOT also commit a package-lock.json or yarn.lock; commit pnpm-lock.yaml.
name: <project>

scripts.gate: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm test && pnpm run validate
